name: Deploy Convoy
summary: Once per STRATCOM, deploy a convoy from one landmark to another. It arrives at the start of the second STRATCOM after deployment. Types: Supply, Support, Assault, Diplomatic, Decoy — each grants completion options (fortify, drills, research, assault, ritual, misdirection).

name: Establish New Hold
summary: Select a Location from your faction's list and begin construction on the map. Note name, build time, and placement in your War Journal; build boxes advance each STRATCOM.

name: Create Map Hazard
summary: Select two locations and build an unlocked map hazard between them. Mark locations, build time, and hazard name in your War Journal.

name: Advance Research Project
summary: Spend up to the full Ichor cost of a research project and advance it one tick. You cannot finish a project on the turn you start it; each faction may have at most 2 projects in development.
